whatsNew: Bugfix - GitHub links now point to correct repository (rebrook/simchakit)

changelog.summary: GitHub link correction and Event Picker footer branding
changes: Bugfix - App.jsx footer: GitHub link corrected from ryanbrook to rebrook
Bugfix - Marketing site (simcha-kit.com): all GitHub links corrected to rebrook/simchakit
UI - Event Picker footer now matches app branding: 'Designed & Built by Ryan Brook · Powered by Claude · GitHub · ⚙ Picker Settings'

changelog.summary: Favicon for Event Picker and event dashboards
changes: New - Added SimchaKit favicon (Star of David, navy background, gold stroke) to browser tabs
New - client/public/favicon.svg added to Vite build source; deploy.sh now copies to public root
Changed - Event Picker index.html updated with favicon link
Changed - deploy.sh now copies favicon.svg alongside assets to public root
UI - Footer now shows 'Designed & Built by Ryan Brook' with email link, 'Powered by Claude', and GitHub link to match DraftKit branding
Bugfix - BudgetTab: amount and budgeted fields now clamp negative values to 0 on input; min='0' HTML attribute alone did not prevent pasting or programmatic negative values
Bugfix - VendorsTab: vendors with 'Deposit Paid' or 'Paid in Full' status but no contact log now show neutral 'No contact log' in muted gray instead of alarming red 'Never contacted' with bell icon
Bugfix - GuestsTab RSVP deadline banner: plural words like '5 days' and '3 households' now bold correctly; previously the regex missed the trailing 's' causing broken rendering like '5 days'
Security - Event data is no longer fetched until access passcode is verified; previously the passcode screen was a visual overlay while all data was already loaded in the DOM
New endpoint - GET /:boardId/api/public-config returns only non-sensitive display fields (name, type, icon, palette, requiresPasscode) for the lock screen
Changed - useSimchaSync hook now accepts 'enabled' parameter to gate WebSocket connection; when false, no connection is opened and state remains null
Changed - App.jsx fetches public-config on mount; WebSocket sync only initiates after passcode verification (or immediately if no passcode required)

roadmap.feature: Multiple favors distributed at different sub-events
roadmap.detail: Currently each favor setup is linked to a single sub-event. Future enhancement: allow multiple favor types each linked to a different sub-event (e.g. water bottles at the party, kippot at the service).

Separate table sets and seat assignments per sub-event (e.g. kiddush at Chizuk Amuno and evening party at Suburban Club). tableId on person becomes tableAssignments: { [sectionId]: tableId }. Migration from flat tableId is automatic. Requires SeatingTab to manage multiple chart contexts.

changelog.summary: Phone formatting for Clergy & Tutor contacts
changes: Bugfix - AdminPanel.jsx ContactBlock: phone fields for Rabbi, Cantor, and Tutor now apply formatPhone() on blur, matching the established pattern in HouseholdModal and VendorModal (10-digit US numbers format to (555) 555-1234, 11-digit starting with 1 format to +1 (555) 555-1234, international unchanged)

roadmap.feature: Multiple favors distributed at different sub-events
roadmap.detail: Currently each favor setup is linked to a single sub-event. Future enhancement: allow multiple favor types each linked to a different sub-event (e.g. water bottles at the party, kippot at the service).

Separate table sets and seat assignments per sub-event (e.g. kiddush at Chizuk Amuno and evening party at Suburban Club). tableId on person becomes tableAssignments: { [sectionId]: tableId }. Migration from flat tableId is automatic. Requires SeatingTab to manage multiple chart contexts.

changelog.summary: Sub-event attendance summary on Overview tab and Print Brief
changes: New - OverviewTab: timeline event cards now display invited and confirmed guest counts per sub-event (computed from household invitedSections and person attendingSections)
New - exports.js generateEventBriefHTML: added Sub-Event Attendance section after Timeline showing per-event breakdown with invited adults/kids, confirmed adults/kids, and pending counts
Improved - Guide entry 'Sub-event attendance' updated to document the new visibility features on Overview tab and Print Brief

Bugfix - OverviewTab and exports.js: corrected sub-event attendance calculation to use normalized data model (count people in invited households) instead of incorrectly assuming household.adults/kids fields exist
